This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The bioactive constituents of Mantisalca amberboides include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, contributing to its medicinal properties.
